***

# 🐉 Bluedude Dragons

> A **How to Train Your Dragon**–themed Minecraft mod that lets you hatch, tame, train, and ride your very own dragons—all within the blocky world of Minecraft.

***

## ⚠️ Alpha Disclaimer

> **Warning:** This mod is currently in **alpha**. Features are subject to change, bugs are expected, and content is actively being developed.

***

## ❓ Q&A

### 🐾 How do I tame a dragon?

*   Right-click a dragon with **any food** to start the taming process.
*   Each feeding increases the taming progress bar.
*   Once full, the dragon will sit and patiently wait for you to claim it.
*   To claim, use **Shift + Right-Click**. A confirmation message will appear once tamed.
*   **Creative shortcut:** use the _Tame Stick_ item to instantly tame a dragon.

__**Side note. You may not have any armor on or have a weapon in your hotbar or taming will not start**__ 

***

### 🥚 How do I hatch an egg?

Place a **heat source** (such as fire or another warm block) beneath or near the egg to trigger hatching.

***

### 🌍 Where can I find dragon eggs?

Dragon eggs are found in **dragon nests**, which naturally spawn across a variety of biomes, including:

*   Cherry Groves
*   Savannas
*   Deserts
*   …and many more!

***

## 🌟 What is _Bluedude Dragons_?

_Bluedude Dragons_ is a Minecraft mod inspired by the _How to Train Your Dragon_ universe. We aim to bring dragons from across the franchise—books, movies, shows, and games—into Minecraft.

Our goals:

*   🥚 **Hatch** unique dragons from eggs
*   🤝 **Tame & bond** with them
*   🏹 **Train** them to obey and protect
*   🌎 **Ride & explore** the world together

***
